Thanks for contributing to vellora! Please fill in the sections below.
First-time contributor? Welcome — don't worry about getting everything perfect; we'll work through it together.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, and `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally (rustfmt/clippy + TS linters)
- [ ] A changeset is included if a published package changed (`npx changeset`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or the public API changed
- [ ] The change stays within vellora's documented HTML/CSS subset and scope

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, tradeoffs you made, or follow-ups left out of scope. -->
